fault_hypothesis: The condition on line 64 should be `len(active) >= limit` instead of `len(active) > limit`. This off-by-one error allows an action when the sensor is exactly at capacity.

constraints.intent: The check should correctly handle the boundary case where the number of active actions equals the limit.
If an action is allowed, the number of active timestamps must be strictly less than the limit.
The number of active timestamps should not be exactly at the limit, as this is the problematic boundary case.
An action cannot be allowed if there are zero remaining slots.
